Interface ISimpleDataConverter2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members used for data conversions.

[Guid("D1E48D08-EE0B-11D3-A0A1-00C04F6BC626")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISimpleDataConverter2 : ISimpleDataConverter
